name: place
description: place — a platform of nine interlocking systems built around a content-heavy commonplace book reference design

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p systems/capability && tsc --noEmit -p systems/data && tsc --noEmit -p systems/persistence && tsc --noEmit -p systems/routing && tsc --noEmit -p systems/search && tsc --noEmit -p systems/security && tsc --noEmit -p systems/component && tsc --noEmit -p systems/design && tsc --noEmit -p examples/sandbox && tsc --noEmit -p examples/commonplace && tsc --noEmit -p examples/docs && tsc --noEmit -p examples/sync-server && tsc --noEmit -p tools/create-app
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
